articles.title: 6 GPT-5 Prompts you Can’t Afford to Miss
articles.description: Ever since GPT-5 dropped, the AI world hasn’t stopped talking about the sheer range of things it can do. Coding, writing assistance, image generation, even acting as an autonomous agent, it’s like having all the things a chatbot can do at one place. But is GPT-5 actually good? Does it really outperform previous OpenAI models? […] The post 6 GPT-5 Prompts you Can’t Afford to Miss appeared first on Analytics Vidhya .

articles.title: ‘Gaslit’ and ghosted: New tech grads face AI-driven hurdles in search for jobs
articles.description: Learning to code and working hard hasn’t been quite enough to land the coveted tech jobs and six-figure starting salaries that computer science graduates were promised, according to a new report in The New York Times this weekend. As the industry grapples with layoffs and the rise of artificial intelligence tools that can perform jobs faster, recent grads paint a picture in which they’re applying for hundreds if not thousands of tech positions only to be ghosted and left feeling “gaslit” about their career prospects. Some of the grads, who had visions of cruising into the tech workforce with skills… Read More
articles.author: Kurt Schlosser

articles.title: Tried an AI Stock Trading Bot: Here’s my Experience
articles.description: Ever wondered if an AI crypto trading bot can actually trade profitably for you? Curious if bots are snake oil or stress savers? I tested eleven AI crypto trading bots, connected them to live accounts on exchanges like Binance and Coinbase, and tracked performance, ease of use, and trust factors. Here’s how it all panned out — including surprises, frustrations, and the bots that genuinely delivered. Why Bother with an AI Crypto Trading Bot? These bots promise 24/7 market monitoring, rule-based logic, risk controls, and backtesting—all without burning hours staring at charts. But the trick is finding one that matches […]
articles.author: Mark Borg
articles.image_path: src/frontend/assets/images/articles/tried-an-ai-stock-trading-bot-heres-my-experience_Tried an AI Stock Trading Bot_ Here’s my Experience

articles.title: Why I Switched to JSON Prompting and Why You Should Too
articles.description: When we interact with LLMs, we typically use natural language, typing a paragraph and hoping the model understands our intent. This approach works until it fails, due to unclear instructions, missing context, or formatting issues that confuse even capable systems. JSON prompting is an emerging technique that uses structured data instead of free-form text. By […] The post Why I Switched to JSON Prompting and Why You Should Too appeared first on Analytics Vidhya .
articles.author: Nitika Sharma
